skills.name: v131-hardware-validation
skills.description: V131 topological photonic cipher hardware validation report: 9/9 tests passed including OOK integrity, stream cipher, encrypted ranging, anti-spoofing, sub-clock TDC, key switching, max bit rate, long-run stability, and fiber coil robustness.

skills.name: v131-markdown-report
skills.description: Machine-readable markdown version of the V131 hardware validation report, available via Accept: text/markdown content negotiation.
